description: Minimal core capability for the LocalPass main window. Beyond core:default, only the native open/save file PICKERS are granted (dialog:allow-open, dialog:allow-save) so the user can choose a file to attach and where to save a download. The pickers return only PATHS — no filesystem read/write capability is granted to the webview, and the attachment plaintext never enters it (the daemon reads the source path and writes the dest path itself). No shell, http, or remote capabilities are granted; the webview loads only bundled 'self' content (strict CSP).
